text:
Henrik Brix Andersen writes:
> Hi Ashish,

Hi Henrik,

> Can you confirm whether or not the just added irc/bitlbee-1.2.2 port
> fixes this for you?

No, this port neither includes the patch I submitted, nor it fixes the
issue for me. I guess, either you add a patch in port, or wait for
upstream indefinitely.

Ashish
